frontMatter.title: Parsing HTML with jsoup
frontMatter.summary: Although a lot of my friends and colleagues use jsoup, i never had a chance to use it. It's my brain default to not choose Java as the language for parsing HTML.

prev.title: Lambda and SAM Conversion in Kotlin - Part 1
prev.summary: I love lambda expression. Whether it's in Java, Kotlin, or Javascript (arrow function). It helps me remove verbosity from my code

next.title: Experimenting Kotlin without Editor
next.summary: What will you do if you want to test some Kotlin syntax?  Chance you are opening your favorite IDE or text editor (not mentioning `vim` or `emacs` user in here) are very likely.
